signals.headline: Mavericks Rookie Cooper Flagg Scores NBA-Record 51 Points as First Teenager Ever | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Mavericks Rookie Cooper Flagg Scores NBA-Record 51 Points as First Teenager Ever | YES | HIGH confidence**  
Dallas Mavericks rookie **Cooper Flagg**, 19, became the first teenager in NBA history to score over 50 points in a game, dropping 51 in a 138-127 loss to the Orlando Magic on Friday.[2]
